title: taraxacum pictum
intro: Taraxacum pictum, also known as the Japanese dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow or orange flowers and deeply lobed leaves. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Taraxacum pictum is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum pictum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, boost the immune system, and protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Taraxacum pictum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be consumed fresh or dried to harness its medicinal properties.
